rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE WILLIAM CAVALIER et al TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Cross Complainants Michael Durney, Camille Durney'S Motion For Consolidation For Trial, And Scheduling Jury Trial
rulings.Rulings: The matter on calendar for Thursday, October 9, 2008, Line 16, CROSS-COMPLAINANTS MICHAEL DURNEY AND CAMILLE DURNEY'S MOTION FOR CONSOLIDATION FOR TRIAL AND SCHEDULING JURY TRIAL IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 16, 2008 PER MOVING PARTY. =301/PJB
